ops.body: CONVERGENCE COMPLETE 2026-07-10 (workflow wf_08c7d70a-d59, 21/21 green, zero errors), superseding the strict-equality criterion per the user's uniformity directive ("just make all of them uniform, add the enabledPlugins, cc-notes, TY_CONFIG_FILE, and newer bash allows to the bases"): pack base promoted at cc-skills 622253c (captain-hook marketplace/plugin, 9-event canonical hook set — SessionEnd = `uvx capt-hook review run` async, SessionStart = `run SessionStart --async` async, verified against captain-hook source; TY_* env moved python→base). Then all 21 repos re-swept: 15 previously-blocked repos CONVERGED (gained the canonical entries; local extras preserved via residue — e.g. cc-context keeps its python/uv allows), 5 previously-migrated repos slimmed their now-redundant residues (mostly to {}), captain-hook adopted the pipeline via a FULLY-LOCAL fragment (dev-repo exception: local hook launcher preserved; union cannot replace hook entries, would double-fire). Zero stale capt-hook hook variants doubled anywhere; zero leaf losses beyond intentionally-replaced stale variants; every Guides check green. Fleet settings.json is now uniformly rendered from the pack: edit plugin/guides/json/* in cc-skills → daily re-renders propagate fleet-wide.
